title: Project E(strogen)
description: Become what you've always wanted to be; a girl
body:
Project E(strogen) is a modpack centered around the Create mod, featuring a progression line towards achieving the production of Estrogen Pills.

Besides Create, the pack is filled with mods for storage, decoration, magic, vehicles, and optimal multiplayer play.

This pack is also build with support for Shaders and Distant Horizons in mind.
